prestazioni: BMW S70/2 6.1L V12 engine: Full titanium internals upgrade with Carrillo H-beam connecting rods (875g each), JE forged pistons (12.5:1 compression), and a bespoke dry-sump system by Peterson Fluid Systems (12-stage scavenging) to eliminate oil starvation during 1.5G lateral loads

Garrett GT42R turbocharger (single-turbo conversion) with a custom billet compressor wheel (60mm inducer, 88mm exducer) and TiAL MV-R 60mm wastegate, paired with a custom 4.5" stainless steel exhaust system by Superform Racing (304-grade, 1.5mm wall thickness) terminating in a quad-annular exit design for optimized backpressure

Motec M190 ECU with bespoke calibration by McLaren Special Operations (MSO) for 900+ HP on 102-octane fuel, featuring a dual-stage launch control system (3,500 RPM soft cut, 5,000 RPM hard cut) and a traction control algorithm derived from the McLaren P1 GTR's 'Track' mode
estetica: Full carbon-fiber LM-spec bodywork by Callaway Competition, including a revised front splitter with integrated dive planes (30% more downforce at 180 mph) and a rear diffuser with active Gurney flaps (adjustable via cockpit switch, +150kg rear downforce at 200 mph)

BBS LM-R three-piece forged magnesium wheels (18x11 front, 18x13 rear) with center-locking titanium nuts by HRE Performance Wheels, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35 ZR18 front, 345/35 ZR18 rear) shaved to 4/32" tread depth for maximum grip

Custom LM Evo livery by MSO featuring a matte 'Papaya Spark' base coat with hand-painted 'Gulf Oil' racing stripes (applied via 3M Scotchcal 1080 vinyl for weight savings) and exposed carbon-fiber weave on the roof, mirrors, and rear wing supports
